summary: Complete testing of VFans Media public purchase page redesign (/l/test-photo-set). All backend and frontend tests passed. The SeeIt.co-style design is working correctly with lock overlay, creator info, verified badge, pricing, email input, trust badges.
critical_code_review_comments: Code quality is good - proper use of data-testid attributes for testing
API correctly returns creator_info in by-slug endpoint response
Error handling works well for both frontend validation and backend 404s
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data: demo@vfans.com user, Test Org, Test Creator, test-photo-set link ($9.99)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Test data exists in DB: demo user (demo@vfans.com/demo with email_verified=true), organization 'Test Org', creator 'Test Creator', link 'test-photo-set' at $9.99. DO NOT re-initialize demo user as it deletes the test data. Login directly. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_vfans_complete.py covers all main API endpoints.

frontend_pages_tested: /l/test-photo-set - Public purchase page with SeeIt.co design
ui_elements_verified: Lock overlay with price in hero
Creator name 'Test Creator' with green verified badge
Description 'A test photo set for sale'
Trust badges (Secure payment, Instant access, Private download)
Email validation error message on empty submit
